verses.text: Solomon in Topa' biakinn leh ama inn a lam khit kum sawmnih a cin' ciangin
Kumpi Hiram in ama tungah a piaksa khuapite Solomon in lampha-in tuate sungah Israel mite tengsak hi
Tua ciangin Hamathzobah-ah Solomon pai-in tua gam a la hi
Amah in sehnel gamsungah Tadmor khua satin Hamath gamsungah vankoihna khuapite khempeuh a lam hi
Amah in khuapi kulh, kongpite, leh zawlte a nei Bethhoron Tungnung leh Bethhoron Nuainung

leh Baalath, leh Solomon' neih vankoihna khuapite khempeuh, a leengte-a' ding khuapite khempeuh, a sakol tuangte-a' ding khuapite, leh Solomon in Jerusalem, Lebanon sung, leh ama ukna gamsung khempeuhah a lamnop khempeuh zong a lam hi
Israel a hilo Hit mite, Amor mite, Perez mite, Hiv mite, leh Jebus mite sung panin a omlai
Israel mite in a suksiat nailoh amau nungah a suanlekhakte uh tua gamsungah a omlaite, Solomon in aana tawh siah a pia dingin bawl a, tua bangin tuni dongin amaute om uh hi
Ahih hangin Israel mite ahih leh Solomon in ama na a sem dingin salin bawllo hi. Amaute pen galkapte, ama nuai-ah uliante, a leengte a ukte, leh a sakol tung tuangte ahi uh hi
Kumpi Solomon' ulian, mite' tungah aana a zang mihing za nih leh sawmnga a om uh hi

Solomon in David khuapi panin Faro' tanu ama zi paipihin ama-a' dingin a lamsak inn-ah tun'pih hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah in, “ Topa' Thuciamna Singkuang a tun'nasa munte a siangtho ahih manin Israel kumpi David' inn sungah ka zi tenglo ding hi,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin Sabbath nite, Khadet nite, leh kum simin a kinei pawi thum — silngo sawhloh anlum pawi, nipikal pawi, leh biakbuk pawite-a' dingin Moses' thupiakna tawh kizui-in nisimin piakna nasep ding a kisam ahih mah bangin innliim mai-a a lam Topa' biakna tau tungah Solomon in meihal biakna Topa tungah a pia hi

A pa David' biakna ngeina kip tawh kizui-in, nasepna dingin siampite a pawlpawlin a kikhennate, leh nisim nasepna-ah a kisam bangin siampite' mai-ah Levi mite phatna lasak pan'munte leh kongpi tampite-a' dingin kongcingte amau' pawl kikhenna ciatah amah in seh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh tua bangin Pasian' mipa David in thu pia hi
Thu khat peuhpeuh leh vanmanpha koihnate tawh kisai-in kumpipa in siampite leh Levi mite a thupiakna bang teekteekin amaute in a sem uh hi
Tua bangin Topa' biakinnpi a kiphuh ni-a kipan a kizawh dongin Solomon' nasep khempeuh kimansiang hi. Tua ahih ciangin Topa' biakinn kizo hi
Tua ahih ciangin Edom gamsung tuipi gei-a om Eziongeber leh Eloth khuate-ah Solomon pai hi

Tua ciangin Kumpi Hiram in teembawte leh tuipi a thei a nasemte tawh ama nasemte sawl a, Solomon' nasemte tawh Ofir-ah paikhawmin tua lai panin kham talen za li leh sawmnga pua-in Kumpi Solomon kiang a tun'pih uh hi.
